WIENER ; SEPARATE STSTEMENT OF ITEMS IN DISPUTE AND RELATED PLEADINGS FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

DISCOVERY 612, SCOTT WIENER APPEARING FOR CCSF. JULIO RAMOS APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES, TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES, AND TO COMPEL VERIFICATIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND, FAILURE TO RESPOND FULLY, AND FAILURE TO VERIFY HER RESPONSES WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND, TO RESPOND FURTHER, AND TO VERIFY HER RESPONSES WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $330, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (612/HEWLETT)
LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: OFF CALENDAR; CASE SETTLED 11/01/04. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; REPORTER: CANDACE YOUNT, CSR #2737.
